uplink.description: high-bandwidth vibration periodic report (g-force 11 g, temp 27C)
uplink._note: Official RadioBridge doc example (DecoderDocs/HBVibrationSensor.md): 1f1c001c2c1ba8 -> g-force 11 g, velocity 0.28 in/s, temp 27 C, bias 1.68 V. high-frequency peak g-force /4 -> vibration.accelerationPeak (g); accelerometer temp -> air.temperature; low-frequency peak velocity 0.28 in/s -> peakVelocity 7.112 mm/s extra. Satisfies vibration.
A frame whose type/axis byte is outside 0x1C-0x1F is not a high-bandwidth vibration report.
